supabaseNotConfigured: Supabase is not configured. Add EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY to your environment.
authLink: Unable to complete the authentication link.
authLinkMissing: The authentication link is missing the required parameters.

fallback.title: Something went wrong
fallback.description: The app hit an unexpected problem. Your account data is still protected.
